# API Contracts

## GET /api/daily-reviews/:id/plan-status returns lightweight plan state for polling

[Trigger]: When the frontend needs to check plan generation progress via polling.
[Detail]: The plan-status endpoint returns a JSON object with three fields: plan_status (null|'running'|'done'|'error'), plan_error (null or error message string), and plan_run_id (links to pipeline_runs table ID). This allows lightweight polling without fetching the entire daily_reviews record.
[Consequence]: Frontend polling operations stay fast and responsive, decoupled from full review data refreshes.

_Source: `src/routes/daily-reviews.js`_

_Tags: `api`_

## Plan generation module exports async generatePlan for detached spawning from routes

[Trigger]: When the daily review detail page triggers plan generation from a suggestion via POST /api/daily-reviews/:id/plan/generate. [Detail]: src/review/plan.js exports async generatePlan(db, suggestionId, options) which is spawned detached by the route handler without awaiting. The function runs in a child process, reads the suggestion context, invokes claude CLI via callClaude, and saves results via savePlan. Returns a task ID for polling. [Consequence]: If routes await generatePlan directly, Fastify event loop blocks for 300+ seconds and other requests timeout.

_Source: `src/review/plan.js`_

_Tags: `api`, `backend`_
